description: Channel mode 状态管理 + resolve 插件。支持 /hijack /release /copilot /resolve 命令，管理每个 channel 的当前模式（copilot/takeover），emit mode_changed 和 channel_resolved 事件。

classes.name: ModePlugin
classes.description: 管理每个 channel 的当前模式。/hijack → takeover，/release|/copilot → copilot，/resolve → emit channel_resolved + 切回 copilot。

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature: (self, emit_event: Callable[[str, str, dict], Awaitable[None]]) -> None

methods.name: on_command
methods.signature: async (self, cmd_name: str, msg: dict) -> None
methods.description: 处理模式切换命令（hijack/release/copilot/resolve），emit mode_changed 或 channel_resolved 事件

methods.name: query
methods.signature: (self, key: str, args: dict | None = None) -> Any
methods.description: query('get', {'channel': ch}) → 返回当前 mode
